briefdescription.para: result element color is element color of more priority color map (or default color, if there isn't color map for this element)
color map aggregating mode
result element color is element color of more priority color map (or default color, if there isn't color map for this element)
color map aggregating mode
result element color is element color of more priority color map (or default color, if there isn't color map for this element)
color map aggregating mode

detaileddescription.para: partial color map Generated from class MR::ColorMapAggregator<MR::VertTag>::PartialColorMap. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_DefaultConstruct, MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).

briefdescription.para: color map aggregating mode
Class for aggregate several color map in one Color maps are aggregated according order.

detaileddescription.para: Generated from class MR::VertColorMapAggregator. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_DefaultConstruct, MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).

partial color map Generated from class MR::ColorMapAggregator<MR::UndirectedEdgeTag>::PartialColorMap. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_DefaultConstruct, MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).

briefdescription.para: color map aggregating mode
Class for aggregate several color map in one Color maps are aggregated according order.

Class for aggregate several color map in one Color maps are aggregated according order.

detaileddescription.para: Generated from class MR::FaceColorMapAggregator. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_DefaultConstruct, MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).
Constructs an empty (default-constructed) instance. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_VertColorMapAggregator_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

Constructs an array of empty (default-constructed) instances, of the specified size. Will never return null. The array must be destroyed using MR_VertColorMapAggregator_DestroyArray(). Use MR_VertColorMapAggregator_OffsetMutablePtr() and MR_VertColorMapAggregator_OffsetPtr() to access the array elements.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_VertColorMapAggregator_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

briefdescription.para: Destroys a heap-allocated instance of MR_VertColorMapAggregator. Does nothing if the pointer is null.
Destroys a heap-allocated array of MR_VertColorMapAggregator. Does nothing if the pointer is null.

detaileddescription.para: Generated from method MR::VertColorMapAggregator::operator=. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The reference to things referred to by the parameter _other (if any) might be preserved in this object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it. When this function is called, this object will drop any object references it had previously.
